10389991.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
10389991.transcript: All right, peons, let's kick it up a notch.

11654632.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
11654632.transcript: I'm super cute and a genius alchemist to boot.

22067670.label: PL1800_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
22067670.transcript: If they want to go all out, then so can I.

27336110.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
27336110.transcript: And if there's one thing you've got, it's impeccable timing.

30621405.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
30621405.transcript: Didn't think you'd keep pace with my genius.

35713720.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
35713720.transcript: Eat alchemy and die, you sword freak.

36714687.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
36714687.transcript: Huh. So the first time wasn't a fluke.

36752646.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
36752646.transcript: I'm a wittle wrecking ball of positivity and rainbows!

47940419.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
47940419.transcript: The sword to warrior ratio is a little... unbalanced.

58907578.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
58907578.transcript: Aww, are you worried about Cagliostro?

69505470.label: PL1800_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
69505470.transcript: Mm-hmm. Score a big one for Cagliostro.

72037171.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
72037171.transcript: Underestimate me at your own peril.

98793365.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
98793365.transcript: I can already think of a dozen experiments to run on you.

109599337.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
109599337.transcript: Take it from me, size doesn't matter.

110241613.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
110241613.transcript: I can't wait to hack through this army of scrubs.

111246432.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
111246432.transcript: Well, well, you've surpassed my low expectations.

113318257.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
113318257.transcript: Can I get a blood sample? How's a leader sound?

117964782.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
117964782.transcript: I'm gonna be the first alchemist to probe a god.

118415920.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
118415920.transcript: Who would stoop to attacking this lovely castle?

129789797.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
129789797.transcript: Cuteness is the way of life.

130036533.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
130036533.transcript: That's because Cagliostro's the hardest worker that ever lived.

138712626.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
138712626.transcript: Not so tough now, are you, buddy boy?

146622526.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
146622526.transcript: I swear, if he doesn't wake up on his own, I'm gonna slap him silly!

147297533.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
147297533.transcript: Divine judgments breathing down your neck.

148897775.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
148897775.transcript: Serious? I think you mean fun.

152805402.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
152805402.transcript: Hey, tough guy. How about letting me run a few tests?

158459325.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
158459325.transcript: Have at it. That's where a clumsy bull belongs.

170287256.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
170287256.transcript: Good work, Mr. Knight, burning them all to crispies.

171752070.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
171752070.transcript: Katalina, I'm about to crank it up.

175631079.label: PL1800_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
175631079.transcript: Let's keep a close eye on the enemy.

175884544.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_break
175884544.transcript: Don't need a lab lizard to tell me.

184628778.label: PL1800_vo_DUO_buff_B_2
184628778.transcript: I'm picking up what you're putting down.

185070492.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
185070492.transcript: Geez, guys. Could you two go a little easier on us?

191979519.label: PL1800_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0900
191979519.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha ha!

196562928.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
196562928.transcript: Someone splurged on swords. Should have invested in skills instead.

197567354.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
197567354.transcript: Who the hell do you think you're talking to?

202498044.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
202498044.transcript: Gotta post for all the fans.

208689891.label: PL1800_vo_ETC_comeback_2
208689891.transcript: Damage to this body? Yep. Trivial.

215632017.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_2chain
215632017.transcript: Though I did most of the work.

221656365.label: PL1800_vo_DUO_rescue2_A
221656365.transcript: I'll have to reward you after this.

244010322.label: PL1800_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
244010322.transcript: Hmm. I'll analyze their attack pattern and come up with a sufficient strategy.

246159372.label: PL1800_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
246159372.transcript: Let me teach ya. True pain.

246242742.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
246242742.transcript: Pretty girls doing pretty girl stuff. Yay!

247427863.label: PL1800_vo_NAV_hp_down_reaction_3
247427863.transcript: Try not getting hit next time.

255996441.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
255996441.transcript: These toys look fun. Hope they don't break too easily.

262673102.label: PL1800_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1300
262673102.transcript: I almost feel bad for you.

264955551.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
264955551.transcript: I refuse to lose this world. I've got a good thing going here.

273363316.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
273363316.transcript: Not bad for a mere specter.

274718403.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
274718403.transcript: Just a simple thanks will do.

275821688.label: PL1800_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_B
275821688.transcript: And make sure they stay down.

276349109.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
276349109.transcript: Actually, that was the least I could do.

276740904.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
276740904.transcript: Keep smiling. We can do this.

283027596.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B
283027596.transcript: You got some backbone after all.

290266224.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
290266224.transcript: Thanks for the support, big guy.

290521754.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
290521754.transcript: You should be honored that I'm the one signing your death warrant.

313984399.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
313984399.transcript: This super cute genius alchemist knows no fear.

330653143.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
330653143.transcript: Want one of your own? I'll craft it. For a price.

332641505.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
332641505.transcript: You're lucky I'm in a good mood right now.

333351791.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
333351791.transcript: Transforming weapons, huh? Now why didn't I think of that?

335618899.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_congrats_2
335618899.transcript: Whoa, I want to be just like you.

344436896.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
344436896.transcript: Congratulations on not disappointing me, Vane.

348909563.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
348909563.transcript: That's all you can say? Not bad? You got the IQ of a test tube or something?

350506631.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
350506631.transcript: There's some mighty fine craftsmanship in that body of yours.

350768916.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
350768916.transcript: What they get for wasting my time.

350840384.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
350840384.transcript: Uh-oh, you've got to make Cagliostro angry.

352014512.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
352014512.transcript: Still with me? Then how about we take things up a notch?

365666822.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
365666822.transcript: Hurry, we've got things to do, places to see.

366763800.label: PL1800_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
366763800.transcript: Let me show you how it's done.

367326860.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
367326860.transcript: Careful where you step, or you'll melt into a puddle of goo.

374248249.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
374248249.transcript: Our current plan is full of holes. We need a new one. Now.

375761826.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
375761826.transcript: A genius in the making, hmm?

381608780.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
381608780.transcript: Say, where'd you guys learn those moves?

386382708.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
386382708.transcript: Why oh why am I so adorable?

391964651.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
391964651.transcript: Let's say we put this furball out of its misery.

411316882.label: PL1800_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_4
411316882.transcript: All right, up and at them.

412179976.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
412179976.transcript: I will show you the acme of my genius.

412502458.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
412502458.transcript: Dragon's blood is a most interesting compound.

414514470.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
414514470.transcript: Oh, I was so looking forward to touring the big city too.

416643397.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
416643397.transcript: How do you like us now?

427986855.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
427986855.transcript: You've always got to have a cute pose in your back pocket.

431301418.label: PL1800_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
431301418.transcript: Too cute to handle. Too smart to beat.

435027189.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
435027189.transcript: Mr. Lizard, I'm coming for you!

436524481.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
436524481.transcript: They only move in certain patterns. They're practically lab rats.

439590711.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
439590711.transcript: According to my calculations, that speed of yours shouldn't be possible.

454836132.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
454836132.transcript: Excellent. More opportunities to find volunteer test subjects.

455415030.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
455415030.transcript: I don't know what you are, but I'm going to stomp your face into the ground.

455422743.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
455422743.transcript: Oh no, he's gonna break the ship!

463637156.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
463637156.transcript: Glad those eyes are still in working order.

475177403.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
475177403.transcript: Who wants to turn monsters into paste with me?

480359757.label: PL1800_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
480359757.transcript: Mm-hmm. Score a big one for Cagliostro.

480660157.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
480660157.transcript: You control the wind, eh? I like to get you in my lab.

498310342.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
498310342.transcript: Compared to the war, this must be a walk in the park.

498413642.label: PL1800_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_3
498413642.transcript: Not in my top form today.

514523100.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
514523100.transcript: I think it's about time we wrapped this up.

515205504.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
515205504.transcript: You idiots have no idea what you're fighting for, do you?

518808172.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
518808172.transcript: I'll trade you the Philosopher's Toner for a skin sample.

526171765.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
526171765.transcript: Watch out, Id. You've got a target on your back.

527922881.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
527922881.transcript: Guess the rest of you can keep up with me after all.

537446120.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_1_FIRST
537446120.transcript: Don't tell me that didn't work.

541736961.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
541736961.transcript: Yeah, dancing with a primal's not half bad.

561356847.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
561356847.transcript: I'd love to get that ectoplasm under a microscope.

562944744.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
562944744.transcript: Time to hit you where the sun don't shine.

563101062.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
563101062.transcript: Kudos to you, Galanza. You slowed it down for us.

567197756.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
567197756.transcript: Nier, wanna elucidate where I was lacking?

567912004.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
567912004.transcript: If our team attack is a hurricane, yours is a wet fart.

579383774.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
579383774.transcript: Watch your backs. No telling what's lurking around here.

580263379.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
580263379.transcript: I fought rocks with more intelligence.

581292163.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
581292163.transcript: Captain, can I take a nap in the shade?

597535625.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
597535625.transcript: R to the A to the C-K-A-M. Go Rackam!

608002567.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
608002567.transcript: I'm too intelligent to get hurt. Yawn.

612437989.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
612437989.transcript: Starting to doubt he's composed of flesh and blood.

617574056.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
617574056.transcript: Fun and games are just getting started.

627291306.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
627291306.transcript: Mind if I take a circuit board as a souvenir?

632044187.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
632044187.transcript: I don't think it's got any new tricks up its sleeves.

632362505.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
632362505.transcript: Wow! Cagliostro wants to fight like a tiger!

637034517.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
637034517.transcript: Huh. One of you numbskulls actually understands the foundation of alchemy.

645038557.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
645038557.transcript: Work it for the fans! Yay!

666762926.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_congrats_3
666762926.transcript: A round of applause. You deserve it.

667232310.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
667232310.transcript: Gonna take home some samples. You know, for science.

677657833.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
677657833.transcript: Cagliostro isn't scared. Not one bit.

681543694.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
681543694.transcript: Take that and that and one of these.

683560596.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
683560596.transcript: Yes, we could have gone a little easier.

683824782.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
683824782.transcript: Ooh, bet I could carve you up for rare ingredients.

699949905.label: PL1800_vo_DUO_buff_A_2
699949905.transcript: Cagliostro is going to kick some tail!

720667538.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
720667538.transcript: I could drill some knowledge into that skull.

721910607.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
721910607.transcript: Hell yeah, two bird brains with one stone.

728340702.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
728340702.transcript: Ah, yeah. He could dust the skies in two seconds flat.

739306680.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
739306680.transcript: You know, I would love to do a little research on Arves.

739554424.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
739554424.transcript: I'm sick of this dumb ice. Smash it!

742496263.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
742496263.transcript: Piece of advice, don't waste good threats on pathetic foes.

745238231.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
745238231.transcript: Get your ass back here, Id, so I can choke you myself.

747432843.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
747432843.transcript: This lady really pisses me off.

749431981.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
749431981.transcript: Sucks we're too busy for a snowball fight. Well, time to die.

753609639.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
753609639.transcript: The Daughtery Grandpa thing's just an act, isn't it?

759653690.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
759653690.transcript: I'd expect no less from a primal.

775323590.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0100
775323590.transcript: Keep up or I leave you behind.

775832603.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
775832603.transcript: Small but noble. Yes, that is a foolproof formula for cuteness.

777241885.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
777241885.transcript: Ugh, I hate taking out the trash.

791196561.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
791196561.transcript: Yeah, I'll bet your brains are in your fists too.

795428698.label: PL1800_vo_ETC_comeback_1
795428698.transcript: A minor setback, but now we're ready.

808845050.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
808845050.transcript: Guess it wasn't nepotism that made you vice-captain.

809060709.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
809060709.transcript: Well, this wasn't in my calculations.

810964610.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
810964610.transcript: You take the front line. I'll take the back.

816914179.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
816914179.transcript: Can I disintegrate him? No one's gonna miss him.

818241364.label: PL1800_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_4
818241364.transcript: Get up. I've still got plans for you.

819635746.label: PL1800_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
819635746.transcript: Too cute to handle. Too smart to beat.

833733726.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
833733726.transcript: Oh, so now you're ready to get serious?

861338860.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
861338860.transcript: This butt-kicking brought to you by the super-cute genius alchemist Cagliostro and...

863419957.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
863419957.transcript: Who invited you peons? Get off our ship!

863494971.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
863494971.transcript: No one makes me sweat my own sweat.

864342144.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
864342144.transcript: Let's send this overgrown lizard straight to the morgue.

865765246.label: PL1800_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_2
865765246.transcript: Can't keep a good Cagliostro down.

868892664.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
868892664.transcript: Pretty sure you're breaking the laws of physics.

871365391.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
871365391.transcript: Shove it in a jar or pin it up. Decisions, decisions.

875471932.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
875471932.transcript: Guess a few decades on the battlefield taught you a thing or two.

880687158.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
880687158.transcript: Oh no! I didn't mean to make you afraid!

882384457.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
882384457.transcript: Oh, Cagliostro doesn't like to get icky and sweaty.

887940948.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
887940948.transcript: You're a millennium too early to be big sistering me.

898879872.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
898879872.transcript: Wanna come play in Cagliostro's lab?

899062496.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
899062496.transcript: You're really starting to piss me off.

903738448.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
903738448.transcript: I didn't, but you're about to lose yours.

913410617.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
913410617.transcript: Okay, so Jerkface here wants to play hardball.

916750149.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
916750149.transcript: Damn, it's like punching a brick wall.

918153318.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
918153318.transcript: Toot toot! Super cute genius alchemist coming through!

928398795.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
928398795.transcript: It's not fair. I'm too perfect.

931188559.label: PL1800_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_3
931188559.transcript: Feeling even better than before, right?

934926857.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
934926857.transcript: Right hook, left jab, magic blast to the face!

938720857.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
938720857.transcript: Horoboros! Time for a little snacky snack.

948409865.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
948409865.transcript: Pretty princess, sword of lead. If she can't cut it, we'll all be dead.

954163519.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
954163519.transcript: Know what happens to subjects that give me lip? They get put down.

954279515.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
954279515.transcript: Hoochie's trying to turn us into ice cubes.

955523165.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
955523165.transcript: Move it or lose it, cretins!

959917499.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
959917499.transcript: Give it up already. No, seriously, stop.

1011191446.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
1011191446.transcript: Am I the founder of alchemy? Better buckle up, kid.

1012527195.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
1012527195.transcript: No mystery is beyond my grasp.

1017374311.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
1017374311.transcript: I'm just a little ray of sunshine.

1027742220.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
1027742220.transcript: Aw, you think you can win!

1027807765.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
1027807765.transcript: You didn't eat my dust. Impressive.

1030444962.label: PL1800_vo_ETC_lockon_4
1030444962.transcript: Take a seat. Professor Cagliostro's ready to teach.

1030554732.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
1030554732.transcript: Cagliostro will take care of you!

1033549335.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
1033549335.transcript: Just who do you think I am?

1037909795.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
1037909795.transcript: Don't go slacking off on me, Lancelot.

1057015631.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
1057015631.transcript: Do me a favor and jump to your doom, kay?

1057960133.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
1057960133.transcript: Cagliostro accepts payment in coin or blood.

1070101802.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
1070101802.transcript: Cagliostro's gonna take you to school!

2379787.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
2379787.transcript: How many more muscle brains can this crew hold?

45799626.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
45799626.transcript: While some girls talk to dolls, Beatrix talks to her sword.

48882039.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
48882039.transcript: Aww, the way you swing your sword is just adorable!

60411469.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
60411469.transcript: What's this? Two super cute warriors have entered the fray!

82501113.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
82501113.transcript: Could be done faster if you would change into your dragon form.

90116132.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
90116132.transcript: Watch out for these dragon cuties.

90867460.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
90867460.transcript: I could make good use of a human incinerator.

93679021.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
93679021.transcript: Too late! I'm a little volcano ready to erupt!

138782709.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
138782709.transcript: How are Sandy's as sweet as candy?

142233990.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
142233990.transcript: Eo, you are the cutest girl I know!

144771555.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
144771555.transcript: Sounds sloppy, but I respect the hustle.

158075014.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
158075014.transcript: He's a man of steel! Look at him go!

180281672.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
180281672.transcript: Yes, you'll make a fine specimen. What?

189211150.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
189211150.transcript: Maybe my antics put the target in your sight. Ever think of that?

191652973.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
191652973.transcript: Says the literal embodiment of an entire element.

211493839.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
211493839.transcript: Actually, with my creations and your skill, you might be onto something.

213982048.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
213982048.transcript: You can't fathom the pain this body can endure.

232827052.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
232827052.transcript: Allow me to break the ice.

268295619.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
268295619.transcript: Super cute genius alchemist Cagliostro, here to save the day!

326873529.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
326873529.transcript: Do you always charge in like a bore?

345404323.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
345404323.transcript: Here comes trouble! His name is Vane.

346834905.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
346834905.transcript: Now watch closely as the pendulum swings. You are Cagliostro's lab rat, my lab rat.

347096896.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
347096896.transcript: You view the world on a draconic scale. I should take notes.

359531495.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
359531495.transcript: Your ignorance is shocking to say the least. Pull up a chair, open your friggin' ears.

368497372.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
368497372.transcript: Aw, you silly Billy. Cagliostro is always serious.

383048537.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
383048537.transcript: Wow! Just like a real hero!

408051870.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
408051870.transcript: You were quieter when you were on obvious side.

431560202.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
431560202.transcript: Sounds like you need to learn more about the amazing Cagliostro.

460521555.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
460521555.transcript: Uh-oh, Cagliostro's a little light-headed too. Can I lean on your shoulder?

538065249.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
538065249.transcript: Actually, I still have lots of fun tricks up my sleeve.

570610739.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
570610739.transcript: Listen, bud, think you could tone down the friendly fire?

573567482.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
573567482.transcript: Wow! Can you shoot the wings off a fly?

594251192.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
594251192.transcript: Cagliostro can rock any hairstyle, silly.

595966349.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
595966349.transcript: Give him a boom and a pow!

601586549.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
601586549.transcript: Huh? Does that mean you owe me a favor?

608291370.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
608291370.transcript: Oh, I would love to take a closer look at Embrask.

631628821.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
631628821.transcript: That's super cute genius alchemist to you, Mr. Wings.

670138323.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
670138323.transcript: Get it, Zeta! Work that spear!

672571368.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
672571368.transcript: They've been very, very naughty, and Cagliostro knows just how to fix them.

701185004.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
701185004.transcript: Think twice before charging to your death.

710109644.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
710109644.transcript: I wouldn't worry. You do you.

723453560.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
723453560.transcript: Oh, I'm tired. Somebody carry me.

824497004.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
824497004.transcript: Ew. Then Cagliostro is definitely not a warrior.

854882291.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
854882291.transcript: Aw, are you accusing me of slacking off?

873986154.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
873986154.transcript: Demonic strength. Now that's something worth studying.

878610872.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
878610872.transcript: Oh, can I hold one of your swords?

895851527.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
895851527.transcript: Heh, that's its least interesting quality.

896152930.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
896152930.transcript: I'm still buzzing from that one.

896839450.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
896839450.transcript: Two little demons doing their pose!

922650494.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
922650494.transcript: Hippies! Grandpa vanished like a ghost back there!

942270519.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
942270519.transcript: Boo! For all your ancient knowledge, you just don't get it.

944277368.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100
944277368.transcript: Yay! Captain gave me a cookie!

955140410.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
955140410.transcript: My, what big compassionate shoulders you have.

976137412.label: PL1800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
976137412.transcript: This butt kicking was brought to you by Cag and Bee.

1038975683.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
1038975683.transcript: Sword, Mancy, huh? Rare type of magic you got there.

1040434323.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
1040434323.transcript: Nice reflexes, champ. We're gonna need more of that.

35174481.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
35174481.transcript: How do you manifest nearly infinite energy for those projectiles?

46816468.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_3
46816468.transcript: Oh, to exercise. Don't be silly.

228902647.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
228902647.transcript: As usual, your smug mug belays great power.

412629502.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
412629502.transcript: Well, we kicked their sorry buttes.

486168312.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_abs_3
486168312.transcript: What if I wrinkle my dress?

557780589.label: PL1800_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL2200
557780589.transcript: Gonna be a bad day for you.

573617978.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
573617978.transcript: You didn't break a sweat either.

607504783.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
607504783.transcript: Oh, I hate this. Exercise is dumb.

661786523.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
661786523.transcript: Says the guy who refuses to use even half his real power.

687228772.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
687228772.transcript: Ah, this isn't my style at all. Sorry not sorry.

714400034.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
714400034.transcript: Come on! Let's show them the cutest pose ever! Yay!

960062196.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
960062196.transcript: In that case, Cagliostro gets to be the cutest girl in all the skies.

997355979.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
997355979.transcript: An alchemist never reveals her tricks.

380219935.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
380219935.transcript: Let's get physical! Hmm! Hmm! Mwah! Nature flinch! Hehe!

431598675.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
431598675.transcript: So, the Supreme Primarch lives up to his name.

493820562.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
493820562.transcript: Whoa, bub. This magic is all me.

580625111.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
580625111.transcript: Well, Lee, mister, you were such a big help.

684847928.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
684847928.transcript: Ooh, I wonder if your wings would look good on me.

1050322016.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
1050322016.transcript: Huh, you're kind of cute when you're being all pure and honest.

1062388217.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_2
1062388217.transcript: I'm a big meme fighter! Yah! Hi-yah! Aaaaah! Doh! Were you scared?

432411505.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
432411505.transcript: Time for a treat. I'm stuffed.

619032164.label: PL1800_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
619032164.transcript: Lunch time! That's what I needed!
